creator: pgollucci@riderway.com
text:
I'll go with convention or you since you're the maintainer,
but If I uninstall the port, I then have to do a

sudo kill -9 $pid since there is no longer a restart script if I forget 
to kill it.

Also, if I upgrade the port which I've done at least 3 times in the last 
6 months, it reminds me to restart it so the new daemon is actually used.


--
